2606.06242.title: Benchmarking Open-Source Layout Detection Models for Data Snapshot Extraction from Institutional Documents
2606.06242.paper_summary: Institutional documents contain substantial amounts of operational and analytical information embedded within figures and tables. Current approaches for extracting visual content from documents are largely built around generic document layout analysis, where figures and tables are treated as uniformly relevant document objects rather than semantically meaningful analytical artifacts. In this work, we introduce a benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for \textit{data snapshot extraction}, the task of identifying and localizing semantically meaningful visual artifacts within institutional documents. The benchmark spans humanitarian reports, World Bank policy research working papers, and project appraisal documents, and includes annotations for figures and tables that contain reusable analytical information. Using this dataset, we benchmarked multiple open-source layout detection models and evaluated both detection performance and spatial extraction quality. Our results show that current models struggle to generalize to operational institutional documents despite strong performance on conventional academic benchmarks. Common failure modes include confusion between analytical and non-analytical content, fragmentation of composite analytical artifacts, and incomplete extraction of contextual information required for interpretation. These findings highlight a persistent gap between generic document layout analysis and operationally useful data snapshot extraction. We release the source PDFs, annotation dataset, metadata, and source code to support future research in operational document intelligence. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ai4data/data-snapshot and the source code is available at https://github.com/worldbank/ai4data/tree/main/experimental/data-snapshot.
2606.06242.paper_summary_zh: 機構文件包含大量的操作和分析信息，這些信息嵌入在圖形和表格中。當前從文件中提取視覺內容的方法主要基於通用的文檔佈局分析，其中圖形和表格被視為統一相關的文檔對象，而不是具有語義意義的分析工件。在這項工作中，我們引入了一個基準數據集和評估框架，用於\textit{數據快照提取}，這是一項識別和定位機構文件中語義上有意義的視覺工件的任務。該基準涵蓋了人道主義報告、世界銀行政策研究工作文件和項目評估文件，並包括對包含可重用分析信息的圖形和表格的註釋。利用這個數據集，我們基準測試了多個開源佈局檢測模型，並評估了檢測性能和空間提取質量。我們的結果顯示，儘管在傳統學術基準上表現良好，但當前模型在操作性機構文件上卻難以泛化。常見的失敗模式包括分析內容與非分析內容之間的混淆、複合分析工件的碎片化，以及對解釋所需的上下文信息的不完整提取。這些發現突顯了通用文檔佈局分析與操作上有用的數據快照提取之間持續存在的差距。我們發布了源PDF、註釋數據集、元數據和源代碼，以支持未來在操作文檔智能方面的研究。該數據集可在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/ai4data/data-snapshot 獲得，源代碼可在 https://github.com/worldbank/ai4data/tree/main/experimental/data-snapshot 獲得。
2606.06242.author: AJ Carl P. Dy et.al.
2606.06242.authors: AJ Carl P. Dy, Aivin V. Solatorio
